title: Ali Baba and the Magic Cave
content:
Long ago in Persia, there lived two brothers. Cassim was rich and proud. Ali Baba was poor but kind. One day, while gathering firewood in the forest, Ali Baba spotted forty armed horsemen riding toward a rocky cliff.

He hid behind a bush and held his breath. The leader stopped before a great boulder and called out: "Open Sesame!" At once, a door appeared in the rock and swung open. The horsemen rode inside, and the door closed behind them.

When they rode away, Ali Baba crept forward and said the magic words. "Open Sesame!" The door swung wide! Inside, oil lamps lit up piles of gold coins and treasure chests stretching far into the darkness.

Ali Baba took only what he could carry and went home. His wife was overjoyed. But his greedy brother Cassim found out and rushed to the cave to fill bags with gold himself.

When Cassim tried to leave, he had forgotten the magic words! He cried out every grain he could think of, but nothing worked. The forty thieves returned and found him there. Ali Baba was heartbroken when he heard the news.

Now Ali Baba was in danger too. The thieves knew someone else had found their cave. Their leader disguised himself as an oil merchant and came to stay at Ali Baba's house, planning his revenge.

But Ali Baba's clever servant Morgiana discovered the plan in time and outwitted the robbers. She saved Ali Baba and his whole family. Ali Baba gave Morgiana her freedom and great riches. He was careful never to let greed put his family in danger again.

author: Traditional
